reply.text: Ive a theory about you and i need proof

messages.text: a theory from pavement squat twitter is crazy😭
about that night, theory is you only sit on floors when you know
concrete knew i was the main course actually
backless top plus distressed jeans confirmed my research
what research, streetwear biology or street danger
both, control group is girls who stay inside
and im the lab rat in heeled sandals 😳
so you just said yes?
you said that like i was impressed
no is a great start tell me more
more is u projecting onto my jeans rn 😂
your replies say otherwise, denim got u chatty
im only here so the pavement feels appreciated 😭
try me
curious why u think ur peer reviewed
relax i got this
say less, show more
i know i do
just because that landed
